case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. YANET G RAMIREZ DE MELENDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $536.03 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DE MELENDEZ, YANET G ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DE MELENDEZ, YANET G $536.03 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $616.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DEFENDANT YANET G RAMIREZ DE MELENDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
